content.content:
=== PLAN ===
Build a browser-based Yew/Rust/WASM Pascal Compiler IDE for COR24 p-code VM. Read-only Pascal source and pre-compiled p-code assembly side by side, with link/assemble/run entirely in WASM. Phase 1: scaffold Yew project with Trunk, wire cor24-emulator + pa24r + pl24r dependencies, build.rs to pre-assemble pvm.s. Phase 2: demo registry — embed .pas + .spc pairs via include_str!(), demo selector dropdown. Phase 3: UI layout — four-panel grid (Pascal source, p-code assembly, output, hardware), Catppuccin Mocha theme. Phase 4: Link & Run pipeline — pl24r linking, pa24r assembly, loader (load .p24 at 0x010000, relocate data refs), batch execution. Phase 5: I/O and hardware — UART output display, UART input field, LED D2 indicator, S2 switch toggle. Phase 6: status bar + polish — Ready/Running/Exited states, instruction count, binary size, Stop button.

=== STEPS ===
  [ ] 001-scaffold-yew-trunk [legacy]: Scaffold the Yew/Trunk/WASM project. Study web-dv24r's Cargo.toml, build.rs, ... <-- YOU ARE HERE

=== CURRENT STEP: 001-scaffold-yew-trunk [legacy] ===
Status: pending
Description: Scaffold the Yew/Trunk/WASM project. Study web-dv24r's Cargo.toml, build.rs, ...
Task type: rust-project-init

=== PROMPT ===
Scaffold the Yew/Trunk/WASM project. Study web-dv24r's Cargo.toml, build.rs, index.html, and src/main.rs for the exact pattern. Set up: (1) Cargo.toml with all dependencies — cor24-emulator (path ../../sw-embed/cor24-rs, default-features=false), pa24r (path ../pa24r), pl24r (path ../pl24r), yew 0.21 (features=[csr]), wasm-bindgen 0.2, web-sys 0.3, gloo 0.11, console_error_panic_hook 0.1. Build-deps: cor24-emulator for pre-assembling pvm.s. (2) build.rs that pre-assembles pvm.s using cor24-emulator's Assembler (copy pattern from web-dv24r, but source pvm.s from pv24a). (3) index.html with Catppuccin Mocha theme (copy from web-dv24r). (4) src/main.rs with minimal Yew app that renders 'Pascal IDE' heading. (5) Trunk.toml if needed. Verify trunk build succeeds.

=== SKILL: rust-project-init (v1) ===
Create a new Rust project with edition 2024 and strict quality gates

Procedure:
  1. Run cargo init (or cargo new) to create the project
  2. Edit Cargo.toml: set edition = '2024' (NOT 2021)
  3. Verify edition with grep or cat Cargo.toml
  4. Run cargo build to confirm it compiles
  5. Run cargo clippy -- -D warnings to confirm zero warnings
  6. Run cargo fmt --check to confirm formatting

Known failure modes:
  - wrong_edition (5x): Leaving the default edition (2021) instead of setting 2024
  - skip_clippy (2x): Skipping clippy check after init, missing early warnings

=== WHEN DONE ===
Run: agentrail begin    (if not yet started)
Run: agentrail complete --summary "what you did" --next-slug <slug> --next-prompt "next instructions"
  Or: agentrail complete --summary "what you did" --done   (if this is the last step)

file.content:
[package]
name = "web-dv24r"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
authors = ["Michael A Wright"]
license = "MIT"
description = "Browser-based p-code VM debugger on COR24"

[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]

[dependencies]
cor24-emulator = { path = "../../sw-embed/cor24-rs", default-features = false }
pa24r = { path = "../pa24r" }
cor24-isa = { path = "../../sw-embed/cor24-rs/isa", features = ["serde"] }
yew = { version = "0.21", features = ["csr"] }
wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
web-sys = { version = "0.3", features = ["console", "HtmlTextAreaElement", "HtmlInputElement", "HtmlSelectElement", "HtmlElement", "KeyboardEvent"] }
gloo = "0.11"
console_error_panic_hook = "0.1"

[build-dependencies]
pa24r = { path = "../pa24r" }
cor24-emulator = { path = "../../sw-embed/cor24-rs", default-features = false }

[profile.release]
opt-level = "z"
lto = true

; pvm.s — P-Code Virtual Machine for COR24
;
; Register allocation:
;   r0 = W (work/scratch, opcode dispatch)
;   r1 = scratch / return address for jal calls

input.content:
[package]
name = "web-p24c"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
authors = ["Michael A Wright"]
license = "MIT"
description = "Browser-based Pascal Compiler IDE for COR24"

[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]

[dependencies]
cor24-emulator = { path = "../../sw-embed/cor24-rs", default-features = false }
pa24r = { path = "../pa24r" }
pl24r = { path = "../pl24r" }
yew = { version = "0.21", features = ["csr"] }
wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
web-sys = { version = "0.3", features = ["console", "HtmlTextAreaElement", "HtmlInputElement", "HtmlSelectElement", "HtmlElement", "KeyboardEvent"] }
gloo = "0.11"
console_error_panic_hook = "0.1"

[build-dependencies]
cor24-emulator = { path = "../../sw-embed/cor24-rs", default-features = false }

[profile.release]
opt-level = "z"
lto = true

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
scaffold Yew/Trunk/WASM project with all dependencies

Set up Cargo.toml with cor24-emulator, pa24r, pl24r, yew 0.21,
wasm-bindgen, web-sys, gloo, and console_error_panic_hook.
build.rs pre-assembles pvm.s using cor24-emulator's Assembler.
index.html with Catppuccin Mocha theme. Minimal Yew app renders
Pascal IDE heading. Trunk.toml configured on port 9199.
trunk build, clippy, and fmt all pass clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
